Wait, the init file says ftKb_MS_EatWalkSlow = 360. So ftKb_MS_EatWait = 359 = 0x167. And ftKb_MS_EatJump1 = 364 = 0x16C.

I should compare how other IASA functions in this file use these same offsets to understand the pattern better.
